description: R02 - US Stat Affiliate Balance Footnote

sqlCommand.descr: update TransX set BusCat = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = 'XX'

insert into TransX (KeyID,Co, GL, TP, BusCat, Amt1, Amt2, Flex1) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, TP, BusCat, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2, 'pass1' as Flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Co, GL, TP, BusCat)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Flex1 is NULL or (Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0))
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex1 = c.SAPname from TransX t inner join Companies c on t.Co = c.Co where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex5 = m.Name, Flex2 = m.OneStreamID from TransX t inner join TPs m on t.TP = m.TP where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex3 = 'Ceded' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex3 = 'Assumed' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (BusCat in ('20','21','22','23','24') or (GL like '13%' and BusCat <> '10'))
update TransX set Flex3 = 'Direct' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = '10'

update TransX set Flex4 = m.Descr, Amt3 = cast(m.Field2 as int) * Amt1, Amt4 = cast(m.Field2 as int) * Amt2 from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on t.GL >= m.ID and t.GL <= m.Field1 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m.Table_ID = 'GLmap1' and Flex3 = 'Assumed'

update TransX set Flex4 = m.Descr, Amt3 = cast(m.Field3 as int) * Amt1, Amt4 = cast(m.Field3 as int) * Amt2 from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on t.GL >= m.ID and t.GL <= m.Field1 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m.Table_ID = 'GLmap1' and Flex3 = 'Ceded'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex4 is NULL

insert into TransX (KeyID,Co, GL, TP, BusCat, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, Amt4, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, Flex5) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, TP, BusCat, 0 as Amt1, 0 as Amt2, Amt3, Amt4, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, 'b. Premiums Earned (40xxx & 41xxx)' as Flex4, Flex5 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex4 = 'a. Premiums written')

sqlSelect.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Co, GL, TP, BusCat, Amt1) values ('[batchID]','[Yr][Mo]',[Yr],[Mo],
insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Co, GL, TP, BusCat, Amt2) values ('[batchID]','[PY][Mo]',[PY],[Mo],
